subcodes.first_line: O thou whom God hath made to speak with proof and demonstration, for some time no letter or message hath come from thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من انطقه الله بالحجه و البرهان مدتیست که نامه ای از شما نرسیده و پیامی
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @humility; meekness; lowliness, @prayer for firmness in the Covenant, @East and West; communication between East and West, @growth of the Cause
